name: MAH TUCKET
title: METAL MAGPIE

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Long Term Plottin'
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may drain a (soulstone) to heal 4.

abilities.name: Perfectly Good Still
abilities.text: After a Shielded token is removed from another model within 8", this model gains a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Extra Smashy
triggers.text: When resolving, remove a friendly token from the target. Deal +2 damage.

triggers.name: Frazzled
triggers.text: The target may discard a card. If it does not, this model draws a card.

triggers.name: In-Built Indicators
triggers.text: Place the target within 3", then make a Scheme marker within 1" of it.

actions.name: Override Circuits
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation. Target gains an Analyzed token and declares an action chosen and controlled by this model.

actions.name: Retrofit
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Another ally only. Target gains a Shielded token and is moved up to 4".

triggers.name: Pulled Here and There
triggers.text: Move either this model or the target up to 3".

triggers.name: Cinders
triggers.text: A model within 3" of the target gains a Burning token.

triggers.name: System Overload
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target must pass a TN 12 Df duel or be dealt 2 damage.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='METAL MAGPIE' back='Metal Magpie'
